# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/xcframework-build/iphonesimulator/build/build-arm64-iphonesimulator
# It was generated by CMake: /opt/homebrew/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
APPLE_FRAMEWORK:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Build all examples
BUILD_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Create Java wrapper exporting all functions of OpenCV library
// (requires static build of OpenCV modules)
BUILD_FAT_JAVA_LIB:BOOL=OFF

//Build libjasper from source
BUILD_JASPER:BOOL=ON

//Build libjpeg from source
BUILD_JPEG:BOOL=ON

//Build only listed modules (comma-separated, e.g. 'videoio,dnn,ts')
BUILD_LIST:STRING=

//Enable Objective-C support
BUILD_OBJC:BOOL=ON

//Build openexr from source
BUILD_OPENEXR:BOOL=OFF

//Build OpenJPEG from source
BUILD_OPENJPEG:BOOL=ON

//Enables 'make package_source' command
BUILD_PACKAGE:BOOL=ON

//Build libpng from source
BUILD_PNG:BOOL=ON

//Force to build libprotobuf runtime from sources
BUILD_PROTOBUF:BOOL=ON

//Build shared libraries (.dll/.so) instead of static ones (.lib/.a)
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=OFF

//Download and build TBB from source
BUILD_TBB:BOOL=OFF

//Build libtiff from source
BUILD_TIFF:BOOL=ON

//Use symlinks instead of files copying during build (and !!INSTALL!!)
BUILD_USE_SYMLINKS:BOOL=OFF

//Build WebP from source
BUILD_WEBP:BOOL=ON

//Include debug info into release binaries ('OFF' means default
// settings)
BUILD_WITH_DEBUG_INFO:BOOL=OFF

//Enables dynamic linking of IPP (only for standalone IPP)
BUILD_WITH_DYNAMIC_IPP:BOOL=OFF

//Build zlib from source
BUILD_ZLIB:BOOL=ON

//Include opencv_calib3d module into the OpenCV build
BUILD_opencv_calib3d:BOOL=ON

BUILD_opencv_core:BOOL=ON

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

CPACK_BINARY_BUNDLE:BOOL=OFF

//Disable explicit optimized code (dispatched code/intrinsics/loop
// unrolling/etc)
CV_DISABLE_OPTIMIZATION:BOOL=OFF

//Use intrinsic-based optimized code
CV_ENABLE_INTRINSICS:BOOL=ON

//Enable OpenCV code trace
CV_TRACE:BOOL=ON

//Allow building and using of DNN plugins
DNN_ENABLE_PLUGINS:BOOL=OFF

//List of DNN backends to be compiled as plugins (openvino, etc

DNN_PLUGIN_LIST:STRING=

//Enable hardening of the resulting binaries (against security

ENABLE_BUILD_HARDENING:BOOL=OFF

//Use ccache
ENABLE_CCACHE:BOOL=ON

//Fail build if actual configuration doesn't match requested (WITH_XXX
// != HAVE_XXX)
ENABLE_CONFIG_VERIFICATION:BOOL=OFF

//Enable compiler options for fast math optimizations on FP computations
// (not recommended)
ENABLE_FAST_MATH:BOOL=OFF

//Collect implementation data on function call
ENABLE_IMPL_COLLECTION:BOOL=OFF

//Instrument functions to collect calls trace and performance
ENABLE_INSTRUMENTATION:BOOL=OFF

//Include SIMD extensions for libjpeg-turbo, if available for this

ENABLE_LIBJPEG_TURBO_SIMD:BOOL=ON

//Show all warnings even if they are too noisy
ENABLE_NOISY_WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

ENABLE_PIC:BOOL=ON

//Solution folder in Visual Studio or in other IDEs
ENABLE_SOLUTION_FOLDERS:BOOL=ON

ENABLE_THIN_LTO:BOOL=OFF

HIGHGUI_PLUGIN_LIST:STRING=

INSTALL_CREATE_DISTRIB:BOOL=OFF

INSTALL_C_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Install Python examples
INSTALL_PYTHON_EXAMPLES:BOOL=OFF

//Install accuracy and performance test binaries and test data
INSTALL_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
IOS_ARCH:UNINITIALIZED=arm64

//Because GCC (as of this writing) and some older versions of Clang
// do not have a full or optimal set of Neon intrinsics, for performance
// reasons, the default when building libjpeg-turbo with those
// compilers is to continue using the older GAS implementation
// of the Neon SIMD extensions for certain algorithms.  Setting
// this option forces the full Neon intrinsics implementation to
// be used with all compilers.  Unsetting this option forces the
// hybrid GAS/intrinsics implementation to be used with all compilers.
NEON_INTRINSICS:BOOL=ON

//Use Orbbec SDK as backend to support more camera models and platforms
// (force to ON on MacOS)
OBSENSOR_USE_ORBBEC_SDK:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
OPENCV_3P_LIB_INSTALL_PATH:UNINITIALIZED=lib/3rdparty

OPENCV_CONFIG_FILE_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/xcframework-build/iphonesimulator/build/build-arm64-iphonesimulator

//Disable filesystem support
OPENCV_DISABLE_FILESYSTEM_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

OPENCV_DOWNLOAD_MIRROR_ID:STRING=github

//Download parameters to be passed to file(DOWNLOAD ...)
OPENCV_DOWNLOAD_PARAMS:STRING=INACTIVITY_TIMEOUT;60;TIMEOUT;600

//Cache directory for downloaded files
OPENCV_DOWNLOAD_PATH:PATH=/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/.cache

OPENCV_ENABLE_ATOMIC_LONG_LONG:BOOL=OFF

//Enable posix_memalign or memalign usage
OPENCV_ENABLE_MEMALIGN:BOOL=ON

//Better support for memory/address sanitizers
OPENCV_ENABLE_MEMORY_SANITIZER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable non-free algorithms
OPENCV_ENABLE_NONFREE:BOOL=ON

OPENCV_EXTRA_MODULES_PATH:PATH=

.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/posit.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/ptsetreg.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/quadsubpix.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/rho.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/solvepnp.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/sqpnp.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/stereobm.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/stereosgbm.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/triangulate.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/undistort.dispatch.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/upnp.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/bundle.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/degeneracy.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/dls_solver.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/essential_solver.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/estimator.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/fundamental_solver.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/gamma_values.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/homography_solver.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/local_optimization.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/pnp_solver.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/quality.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/ransac_solvers.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/sampler.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/termination.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/usac/utils.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/opencl/stereobm.cl;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/xcframework-build/iphonesimulator/build/build-arm64-iphonesimulator/modules/calib3d/opencl_kernels_calib3d.cpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/xcframework-build/iphonesimulator/build/build-arm64-iphonesimulator/modules/calib3d/opencl_kernels_calib3d.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/ap3p.h;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/calib3d_c_api.h;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/chessboard.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/circlesgrid.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/distortion_model.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/dls.h;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/calib3d/src/epnp.h;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.1 OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_core_WRAPPERS:INTERNAL=java;objc;python;js
//The category of the module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_CLASS:INTERNAL=PUBLIC
//Brief description of opencv_dnn module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_DESCRIPTION:INTERNAL=Deep neural network module. It allows to load models from different frameworks and to make forward pass
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_IS_PART_OF_WORLD:INTERNAL=ON
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_LABEL:INTERNAL=Main;opencv_dnn
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_LINK_DEPS:INTERNAL=
//Location of opencv_dnn module sources
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_LOCATION:INTERNAL=/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/dnn
//Optional dependencies of opencv_dnn module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_OPT_DEPS:INTERNAL=
//Optional private dependencies of opencv_dnn module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_PRIVATE_OPT_DEPS:INTERNAL=
//Required private dependencies of opencv_dnn module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_PRIVATE_REQ_DEPS:INTERNAL=
//Required dependencies of opencv_dnn module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_REQ_DEPS:INTERNAL=opencv_core;opencv_imgproc
//List of wrappers supporting module opencv_dnn
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_WRAPPERS:INTERNAL=python;java;objc;js

//The category of the module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_features2d_CLASS:INTERNAL=PUBLIC
//Flattened dependencies of opencv_features2d module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_features2d_DEPS:INTERNAL=opencv_core;opencv_flann;opencv_imgproc
//Extra dependencies of opencv_features2d module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_features2d_DEPS_EXT:INTERNAL=
//Flattened dependencies of opencv_features2d module (for linker)
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_features2d_DEPS_TO_LINK:INTERNAL=opencv_core;opencv_flann;opencv_imgproc
//Brief description of opencv_features2d module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_features2d_DESCRIPTION:INTERNAL=2D Features Framework
//List of header files for opencv_features2d

//Location of opencv_features2d module sources
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_features2d_LOCATION:INTERNAL=/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/features2d

oc/src/corner.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/filter.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/filter.simd.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/filterengine.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/fixedpoint.inl.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/hal_replacement.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/imgwarp.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/median_blur.simd.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/morph.simd.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/precomp.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/resize.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/smooth.simd.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/sumpixels.avx512_skx.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/imgproc/src/sumpixels.simd.hpp

eserve.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/photo/src/fast_nlmeans_denoising_invoker.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/photo/src/fast_nlmeans_denoising_invoker_commons.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/photo/src/fast_nlmeans_denoising_opencl.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/photo/src/fast_nlmeans_multi_denoising_invoker.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/photo/src/hdr_common.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/photo/src/npr.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/photo/src/precomp.hpp;/Users/j.freyer/Desktop/opencv-ios-custom/scripts/work/opencv-4.10.0/modules/photo/src/seamless_cloning.hpp
